products.name: HTT Series Miniature Temperature Transmitter
products.overview: The HTT Mini Series is a compact high-accuracy temperature transmitter for industrial process monitoring. Its small form factor allows direct installation in pipe fittings, equipment slots and narrow spaces. Supports 4-20mA analogue output with RS485 / HART / Modbus digital protocols. EMC-hardened circuit for interference-prone environments.
features: Compact integrated design: small size for confined spaces such as equipment rooms, pipe slots, and small vessels
Quick installation: supports threaded, snap-on, or flange connection; no additional accessories required
High accuracy ±0.1°C with automatic non-linear compensation for thermocouple/RTD drift
EMC-compliant circuit with strong resistance to electromagnetic interference, voltage fluctuations, and RF noise
Multiple output types: supports 4-20mA analogue, digital, or hybrid; compatible with HART, Modbus, direct PLC/DCS
Optional LCD screen shows measured temperature value with local and remote viewing support
High protection: IP65/IP67 rated, dust-proof, waterproof, and corrosion-resistant
Low power consumption: reduces energy usage over 30% compared to conventional transmitters

products.name: HTT Series Temperature Transmitter
products.desc: Thermocouple & RTD transmitter, 2-wire 4-20mA, LoRaWAN/NB-IoT/4G/RS485/HART/Modbus, IP65, battery or DC 9V~36V.
products.overview: The HTT Series 2-wire temperature transmitter supports both thermocouple (TC) and RTD (PT100/PT1000) sensors. It installs directly in the sensor junction box, sharing the 4-20mA signal line as a power supply — eliminating expensive cabling. Multi-protocol wireless options (LoRaWAN, NB-IoT, 4G) available for remote transmission over kilometres.
features: In-head installation: mounts directly in sensor connection head, 4-20mA output; cost-effective with strong EMI immunity
Automatic cold-junction compensation for thermocouple input
High accuracy ±0.1°C to ±0.5°C; repeatability ≤0.1%; silicone-sealed structure for vibration and moisture resistance
Multiple communication options: LoRaWAN, NB-IoT, 4G, RS485, 4-20mA in one device
Compatible with industrial control systems: Modbus, HART protocols; integrates with PLC, DCS, SCADA
Flexible power supply: supports 3.6V battery or external DC 9–36V
Battery life ≥5 years at ambient temperature / ≥18 months at −30°C

products.name: HPT Series Miniature Pressure Transmitter
products.desc: High-accuracy miniature pressure transmitter, cavity-free direct pipe mounting, gauge/absolute/differential, IP67/IP68, 4-20mA/RS485/HART.
products.overview: The HPT Mini Series miniature pressure transmitter uses silicon micro-fusion and diffused silicon sensing technology for compact, lightweight and highly accurate pressure measurement. The all-stainless-steel structure is suitable for direct pipeline mounting from DN25. IP67/IP68 waterproofing and explosion-proof options (Exd IIC T6 Ga) make it ideal for outdoor and hazardous environments.

specs.label: Explosion-proof rating
specs.value: Exd IIC T6 Ga / Ex ia IIC T6 Ga (optional)

features: Micro-integrated structure: compact, easy pipeline installation from DN25; supports clamp and flange mounting
Flexible materials: 316L stainless steel, Hastelloy C-276, or ceramic; meets GMP hygiene standards; IP67/IP68
Integrated temperature compensation and overload resistance: ±0.1% FS accuracy from −40°C to 85°C; withstands 3× rated pressure
Self-diagnostics and data protection: auto-detects sensor breaks, over-range; data protection on power loss
Multiple interfaces: 4-20mA analogue, RS485 (Modbus), HART 7.0; integrates with PLC, DCS, and IoT platforms
Wide measurement range: 0 to 100 MPa customisable; supports gauge, absolute, and differential pressure

products.name: HPT Series Intelligent Pressure Transmitter
products.desc: Intelligent pressure transmitter, compact design for direct pipe mounting, gauge/absolute/differential pressure, IP67/IP68, 4-20mA/RS485/HART.
products.overview: The HPT Series intelligent pressure transmitter is a new-generation microprocessor-based transmitter achieving ±0.075% FS accuracy. It supports HART 7.0 and Modbus for remote calibration and status monitoring. IoT cloud connectivity enables real-time data analysis, alarm management and energy optimisation. Memory retains calibration data through power outages.

specs.label: Body / Diaphragm material
specs.value: SS housing; 316L diaphragm; FKM or NBR O-ring

features: High-accuracy silicon sensor: supports thin-film and diffused silicon sensors; accuracy up to ±0.075% FS
HART 7.0 remote calibration, parameter setting, and status monitoring without site visit
Industrial IoT connectivity: uploads pressure data to cloud platform for real-time monitoring
High durability: strong overload capacity, stable output in variable temperature, vibration, and impact conditions
Comprehensive protection: up to IP67/IP68; dust-proof, waterproof, and corrosion-resistant
Data continuity: parameters retained after power restoration; non-volatile EEPROM memory

products.name: HPT Series Differential Pressure Transmitter
products.desc: Smart differential pressure transmitter, ±0.075% accuracy, range ratio 100:1, HART/Modbus/LoRaWAN, IP65/IP67, for flow/level/filter monitoring.
products.overview: The HPT ΔP Series smart differential pressure transmitter measures precise differential pressure between two process points. Core applications include flow calculation, liquid level in pressurised vessels, filter monitoring and leak detection. ±0.075% accuracy with 100:1 turndown. LoRaWAN wireless option for remote installations.

specs.label: Connection
specs.value: Flange DN15–DN200 PN16–PN400; Thread M20×1.5 or 1/2" NPT

features: Advanced composite sensor: single-crystal silicon or diffused silicon; ±0.075% FS accuracy
Wide turndown ratio up to 100:1; covers micro DP (0–1 kPa) to high DP (0–10 MPa) in one transmitter
Excellent long-term stability: drift better than 0.1%/year, reducing calibration frequency
Remote configuration and calibration via HART, Modbus without on-site manual operation
Non-volatile EEPROM memory: calibration data retained during power loss
Corrosion-resistant diaphragm: 316L stainless steel, Hastelloy C, Monel, or Tantalum for corrosive media
Self-diagnostics: monitors sensor status, circuit, and communication with 100ms alarm response

products.name: HLP Series Flange Level Transmitter
products.desc: Flange-type level transmitter for high-temp, high-viscosity, crystallizing or corrosive media. ±0.1% FS accuracy, 4-20mA/HART/Modbus, IP67/IP68.
products.overview: The HLP Flange Series level transmitter is engineered for demanding media — high-viscosity fluids, crystallising liquids, corrosive acids and slurries. The direct-flange diaphragm eliminates impulse lines that can block or freeze. Diaphragm materials include 316L stainless steel, Hastelloy C, Monel and Tantalum. Integrated LoRaWAN / NB-IoT for remote monitoring.
features: High accuracy: ±0.1% FS for precise liquid level measurement across most industrial scenarios
Integrated compensation: auto-corrects for temperature and pressure variations for stable data
Multi-protocol support: 4-20mA with HART, Modbus; compatible with PLC, DCS, and industrial automation systems
Flexible diaphragm materials: 316L, Hastelloy C-276, Tantalum, PTFE; customisable for high-temp and sanitary use
Strong EMI resistance: multi-frequency RF filter counters electromagnetic interference in industrial environments
Solid protection: IP68 rated housing resists dust and contaminated water ingress
Easy installation and calibration: standard flange connection; supports zero and span calibration via HART

products.name: HLP Series Immersion Level Gauge
products.desc: Immersion hydrostatic level gauge, 0.3~110m range, ±0.1% FS accuracy, 4-20mA/RS485/4G/LoRaWAN, IP67/IP68 for tanks, wells and open channels.
products.overview: The HLP Immersion Level Gauge (hydrostatic submersible transmitter) measures liquid level based on hydrostatic pressure proportional to fluid column height. Drop the probe directly into any open vessel, river, borehole or reservoir. No tank modification needed. IP67/IP68 rated, corrosion-resistant materials, EMI-protected circuitry and 4G wireless for remote monitoring.
features: Submersible design: sensor immersed directly without complex installation; suitable for tanks, rivers, deep wells
High accuracy: isolated diffused silicon or capacitive sensor with ±0.1% FS full-scale accuracy
Auto temperature compensation: integrated sensor auto-corrects for liquid density changes from −40°C to 125°C
Corrosion-resistant and explosion-proof: 316L stainless steel or PVDF; Exd II CT6 option for hazardous environments
Rigid, durable structure: no moving parts; shock-resistant and vibration-resistant for long service life
Multiple output signals: 4-20mA, 0-5V, 0-10V, RS485 for easy PLC/DCS integration
Wireless 4G transmission option: direct interaction with monitoring platforms, no RTU required
Comprehensive protection: reverse polarity, over-current/over-pressure, and EMI protection built-in

products.name: HOR Radar Level Gauge
products.desc: Non-contact radar level gauge, 26GHz/80GHz, ±1mm accuracy, up to 70m liquid / 35m solid, 4-20mA/HART/RS485/Modbus, IP67.
products.overview: The HOR Series uses a proprietary CMOS millimetre-wave RF chip to generate pulsed FMCW radar, achieving ±1mm measurement accuracy. 26 GHz standard / 80 GHz high-accuracy options. Non-contact technology means no media contamination, no wear and minimal maintenance costs. Supports Bluetooth in-field calibration via mobile phone. Rated for all dielectric constants ≥2.

specs.label: Measurement range
specs.value: Liquid: 0–30 m (up to 70 m); Solid: 0–20 m (up to 35 m)

specs.label: Process connection
specs.value: Threaded / Universal flange / Anti-corrosion flange / Sanitary clamp

features: Self-developed millimetre-wave CMOS RF chip: higher SNR, smaller dead zone, cleaner RF structure
Wide 5 GHz bandwidth for high resolution and measurement accuracy
Horn antenna design: narrow beam angle, focused energy, minimises false echoes inside tanks
Non-contact measurement: no media contamination, no wear, no maintenance; service life over 10 years
On-site calibration via mobile phone Bluetooth — no laptop required
Multiple interface support: 4-20mA/HART or RS485/Modbus
Works on any media with dielectric constant ≥2; temperature range −40°C to +300°C
Self-diagnostics and protection: auto-monitoring with full-system fault alerts; reverse polarity protection
